properties.displayName: Storage accounts should restrict network access (excluding storage accounts managed by Azure Red Hat OpenShift)
properties.description: Network access to storage accounts should be restricted. Configure network rules so only applications from allowed networks can access the storage account. To allow connections from specific internet or on-premises clients, access can be granted to traffic from specific Azure virtual networks or to public internet IP address ranges. Storage accounts in resource groups managed by Azure Red Hat OpenShift are excluded from evaluation.

metadata.description: The effect determines what happens when the policy rule is evaluated to match
